headline: Bank of America sees Exxon differently than oil market
summary: Exxon Mobil (XOM) stock hasn’t been moving as much, considering the loud warnings from the oil market. The Guardian reports that Brent crude has been dropping fast as traders price in a reduction in Strait of Hormuz risks, and investors have reason to be cautious. Exxon dropped 6.52% over the ...

headline: Exxon Set to Supply LNG to South Africa’s First Import Terminal

headline: Exxon Mobil (XOM) Advances Guyana Project And Signs South Africa LNG Deal
summary: Exxon Mobil moved ahead with approval steps for a new offshore development phase in Guyana’s Stabroek block, targeting up to 35 additional wells. The company signed a preliminary agreement to supply LNG to a planned power project in South Africa. Exxon Mobil is also exploring LNG expansion paths in Asia-Pacific, including a potential transaction with Woodside Energy. Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) is adding new projects to an already well-established portfolio, with the stock recently closing at...

headline: 2 Reasons to Avoid XOM and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: ExxonMobil’s 20.7% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 8.3%, and its stock price has climbed to $141.74 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: TAE Technologies Appoints Jeff Woodbury as President and COO
summary: TAE Technologies, Inc. ("TAE" or the "Company"), a leading fusion energy company, announced today the appointment of Jeff Woodbury as President and Chief Operating Officer. Woodbury joins TAE as the company advances commercial development of its technologies, including the construction of its first utility-scale fusion power plant.
